comment: Depending on the class, a subclass will have different levels in which they give features out to a character
Ignore this section when making a class, just for extra info on building features

passive.comment: This type is for features that don't require any addition to any character traits and just adds an ability that is always active

resource.comment: This type is for features that have an amount of times you can use it per period of time

choice.comment: This type is for features that require you to choose between an amount of options

external_choice.comment: This type is for features that require you to choose between an amount of options from one of the external lists
